title: AI-driven memory shortage boosts investments and hurts smartphone shipments
summary: Strong demand for memory chips for artificial intelligence causes historic fall in smartphone shipments, accelerates Samsung's expansion and possible IPO of CXMT, and improves sector outlook.

title: Cautious optimism and correction warnings mark investor outlook
summary: Multiple reports and analysts recommend caution amid risk of stock market correction after recent rally, as market awaits macro data and upcoming Fed decisions.

title: Conflict with Iran raises oil prices and generates uncertainty in global markets
summary: Ongoing military tensions in the Middle East, the blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, and US threats push crude above $87 and affect stock markets.

title: Wall Street big banks achieve record profits supported by AI and market activity
summary: Morgan Stanley, PNC Financial, and BNY Mellon report significant increases in quarterly profits, driven by demand for artificial intelligence and strong business volume.

title: Stripe and Advent launch buyout offer for PayPal valued at over $53 billion
summary: The joint proposal by Stripe and Advent International fund to acquire PayPal sends shares of the payments company up 10% in premarket trading.

title: US inflation falls to 3.5%, largest decline in six years
summary: The inflation data surprises to the downside and reinforces the possibility that the Fed will keep rates unchanged, triggering a rally in global stock markets.

title: ASML raises sales forecasts to 45 billion due to AI chip demand
summary: The semiconductor equipment manufacturer improves its annual outlook thanks to intense spending on artificial intelligence, boosting its stock price.

title: US producer prices unexpectedly fall in June
summary: The producer price index falls below forecasts, suggesting a moderation of inflationary pressures and giving the Fed room to maintain its current policy.

title: Bitcoin and ether rebound after moderation of US inflation
summary: The price of major cryptocurrencies recovers after the inflation data, while firm Circle faces allegations of market manipulation against a fund linked to Tether.

title: Board and executive movements mark the session with notable trades
summary: Vickers reports capture insider buys and sells in companies like HeartFlow and Netskope, indicating confidence or lack thereof in their respective companies.

title: Mixed results in healthcare sector: J&J beats estimates, Celcuity and Veradermics record disparate moves
summary: Johnson & Johnson beats expectations and rises, Celcuity falls due to delay of its oncology drug, and Veradermics gains after positive data on alopecia, while Merck and Pfizer also grab attention.

title: ECB advocates caution and Bundesbank leans towards a pause in rates
summary: The ECB governing council recommends acting with caution, while Bundesbank president Joachim Nagel considers the current interest rate level appropriate for a pause in July.

title: Conagra Brands cuts fiscal 2027 profit forecast and calls investors
summary: The food company lowers its earnings estimates for the next year and schedules an earnings conference to discuss its outlook.

title: BlackRock reaches all-time high of $15.3 trillion in assets under management
summary: The world's largest asset manager reports record assets under management and its CEO, Larry Fink, is optimistic about the strength of markets and investor demand.

title: Ibex 35 gives up ground weighed by Fluidra and Telefónica, while ACS leads gains
summary: The Spanish benchmark accumulates declines in a session marked by corporate earnings, with Fluidra and Telefónica as the biggest laggards and ACS as the top gainer.

title: IBM plummets 25% on shift in corporate spending towards artificial intelligence
summary: IBM shares fall sharply after reports that clients are reallocating their IT budget from traditional services to artificial intelligence solutions.

title: Renta 4 raises BBVA price target as Bank of America withdraws buy recommendation
summary: Analysts show divergent views on BBVA ahead of its results, with Renta 4 highlighting its AI growth and Bank of America concerned about its exposure to Turkey.

title: Warren Buffett plans to donate all his Berkshire Hathaway stake before 2034
summary: A report reveals that the 95-year-old investor plans to transfer all his shares in the US conglomerate in the coming years.

title: India-UK free trade agreement comes into force
summary: The trade agreement eliminates tariffs and facilitates trade in services between both countries, enhancing bilateral relations.

title: Apple Intelligence gets approval in China via Alibaba's Qwen model
summary: Apple's artificial intelligence assistant will be available in the Chinese market thanks to collaboration with Alibaba and its Qwen model.
